name: PhaseOne
description: '''Graeme Duffy''' (born 22 December 1989) {{Abbr|bka|better known as}} '''PhaseOne''' is an [[Australians|Australian]] [[Disc jockey|DJ]], [[Electronic music production|electronic music producer]] and [[record label executive]]. PhaseOne is well known for producing and releasing [[Metalstep]] [[music record]]: A subgenre within [[dubstep]] that combines [[Rock music]] & [[Heavy metal music]] with [[Bass music]] and other genres in [[Electronic music]]. PhaseOne also founded a record label called Sounds of Mayhem Recordings.
